title: WebUI real-time Test Dashboard with Runner start/stop controls
description: Enhance existing TestLab.tsx with: (1) RunnerControl component — Start/Stop/Pause buttons that spawn/control runner via Claude SDK session or directives, safe stop via pause directive not process kill. (2) AttentionPanel component — priority-sorted issues needing attention (replaces flat stats as primary view). (3) ActivityStream component — SSE-driven real-time log of phase events as they happen. (4) EvolutionTimeline component — visual timeline of framework evolution milestones. Backend: new POST /api/tests/runner/{start,stop,status} endpoints. Enhance SSE events from file-watcher for granular state change notifications.
